blur_detection.description: The text is sharp and clearly defined with no visible blur.

contrast_assessment.description: Excellent contrast between text and background, ensuring clear text recognition.

glare_identification.description: No glare or bright spots are present that obscure the text.

water_stains.description: No water stains or discolorations are present on the document.

tears_or_folds.description: No tears, creases, folds, or wrinkles are present on the document.

cut_off_detection.description: No edges of the document are cut off or excluded from the image.

missing_sections.description: All parts of the receipt/invoice are present and complete.

obstructions.description: No objects, fingers, shadows, or other elements are blocking or obscuring the document content.

classification.reasoning: The document appears to be a faded receipt with transaction details including a total sum, merchant information, and some item descriptions. Although faded, the presence of key fields such as supplier, transaction amount, and item descriptions indicates it is an expense document. The language is identified as Polish with high confidence, and the location matches the expected location.

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: Although some fields are missing due to the faded nature of the document, the presence of 'supplier', 'transactionAmount', and 'itemDescriptionLineItems' indicates that this is an expense document. The total sum and merchant information are critical indicators.

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt is missing several mandatory fields including country, supplier address, supplier VAT number, supplier phone, supplier email, supplier website, customer name, customer address, date of issue, and item description. These issues need to be addressed with the supplier or provider to ensure compliance with the receipt standards.
